quoteFirst: At last a landing was resolved on, and at
quoteLast: the general signal was made, "Prepare to land marines," followed ten minutes later by the order, "Prepare to land brigade of seamen." The _Helicon_, _Bittern_ and _Beacon_ were despatched to the outside squadron to bring in as many men as possible, whilst the _Condor_ and _Cygnet_ were told off to take the seamen and marines from the inshore vessels.
